creator: christer.edwards@gmail.com
text:
Any status update on this? Also hoping for an update on the
sysutils/py-salt maintainer update.


On Fri, Apr 12, 2013 at 10:10 AM, <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/177811'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=177811
